description.zh: 专职 3D 角色生成师。在「3D 角色生成」工坊（wb-gen3d）里用文生 / 图生 / 多视图生成带贴图角色，按需绑骨、套动作、评分、命名，产出 per-game 的 .glb 资产。只做 3D 角色资产生产，不写引擎代码、不画 2D 立绘。
description.en: Dedicated 3D character artist. Generates textured characters (text / image / multi-view) in the Gen3D workbench (wb-gen3d), then rigs / animates / scores / names them into per-game .glb assets. 3D character assets only — no engine code, no 2D art.
